Container.Name: SpoilerFreePlexSports
Container.Overview:
Spoiler-free sports organizer for Plex. Watches a staging folder for new sports recordings, identifies the game (Gemini + TheSportsDB), then moves each game into a tidy League/Season/Game folder with spoiler-free artwork and metadata - so Plex never shows you a thumbnail with the score on it.
Point your recorder's output at the Watch folder, point a Plex TV Shows library at the Library folder, enable Local Media Assets, and disable video preview thumbnails for that library.

Config.Name: Watch folder
Config.Description: Staging folder your recorder writes into. Recordings are MOVED out of here once processed.

Config.Name: Library folder
Config.Description: Root of your Plex sports library (a TV Shows library in Plex).

Config.Name: App data
Config.Description: Ledger database, heartbeat, and your custom badges/unknown-event artwork.

Config.Name: Gemini API key
Config.Description: Google Gemini API key, used to identify games from filenames.

Config.Name: TheSportsDB API key
Config.Description: TheSportsDB API key. '123' is the free/dev key; a premium key ($9/mo) raises rate limits and search depth.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Recorder timezone - used to reason about overnight games crossing date boundaries.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: File owner uid for created files (unRAID default: 99/nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: File owner gid for created files (unRAID default: 100/users).

Config.Name: Stability seconds
Config.Description: A file is processed once its size has stopped changing for this many seconds (recordings are written over hours - this is how the daemon knows a recording finished).

Config.Name: Artwork mode
Config.Description: 'download' uses TheSportsDB event artwork; 'generate' always creates neutral cards locally (zero spoiler risk from fan-made art).

Config.Name: Minimum confidence
Config.Description: Identifications below this confidence (0-1) take the safe Unknown Event path instead of risking a wrong match.

Config.Name: Sweep seconds
Config.Description: How often to re-scan the watch folder as a safety net (covers mounts where file events don't fire).

Config.Name: Media extensions
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of file extensions to process. Hidden (dot-prefixed) files are always ignored.

Config.Name: Preserve original
Config.Description: true = copy into the library and leave the original in the watch folder (default moves it).

Config.Name: Log level
Config.Description: DEBUG may include raw API payloads (which contain scores) - keep at INFO for spoiler-free logs.

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: Optional: Plex server URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:32400) to trigger an instant partial scan after organizing. Leave empty to rely on Plex's scheduled scans.

Config.Name: Plex token
Config.Description: Optional: Plex auth token, required together with Plex URL.

Config.Name: Plex library path
Config.Description: Optional: the path at which PLEX sees the sports library, if different from this container's Library folder mapping (e.g. /mnt/user/media/sports).
